series_metadata.series_description: Form used by absent Uniformed Service members, their families, and citizens residing outside the United States. It may be used to register to vote, request an absentee ballot or update their contact information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain four (4) years, then may destroy unless used as a voter registration form, then retain permanently. ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years, then may destroy unless used as a voter registration form, then retain permanently., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
